config.title: Kreator amortyzacji #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'msgbox #include "50122" 'CProgressPage #include "50632" 'choose_rejestr_dok #include "50517" 'HARUI_FREE #include "50101"
dim g_nYear dim g_nMonth
function create_amortyzacje() dim oArrIds : set oArrIds = scan_selection() if oArrIds.count = 0 then MessageBox "Nie wybrano żadnego środka trwałego", "Kreator amortyzacji", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if
'Pobierz rejestr dokumentów dim idRejestr idRejestr = choose_rejestr_dok(CStr( N5REJESTRDOK_SRODKI_TRWALE ), false, "Wybierz rejestr dokumentów") if idRejestr <= 0 then exit function end if
trans_.var(APPVAR_OPSRTW_TYP) = clng(N5OPSRTRW_AMORTYZACJA)
trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = idRejestr
dim pPP : set pPP = new CProgressPage pPP.init "Tworzenie amortyzacji" dim iter for iter = 0 to oArrIds.UpperIndex() dim pOpSrTrw : set pOpSrTrw = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5OPSRTRW) with pOpSrTrw set .pSRTRW = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SRTRW,oArrIds.Value(iter)) .dDataAmort = DateSerial(g_nYear,g_nMonth,1) .curAmortPod = .n5opsrtrw_wylicz_amort_pod() .curAmortBil = .n5opsrtrw_wylicz_amort_bil() if .curAmortPod = ccur(0.0) and .curAmortBil = ccur(0.0) then .ignore = true end if end with
pPP.update "Utworzono amortyzację dla " + pOpSrTrw.pSRTRW.text
if pPP.is_broken() then exit function end if next set pPP = nothing if trans_.saveobjects() then frefresh else trans_.discard end if end function
function frefresh() fill_results g_nYear,g_nMonth end function
function fopen() : fopen = true #ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then fopen = false exit function end if #endif g_nYear = year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) g_nMonth = month(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) frefresh end function
function fill_results(byval nYear,byval nMonth) dim pCursor : set pCursor = trans_.createadors( trans_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "select 'c_sr_nazwa'=strNazwa,'c_sr_idobj'=idobj,curWartoscPod,curUmorzPod,curWartoscBil,curUmorzBil from n5srtrw where idobj not in (select psrtrw from n5opsrtrw where " +_ "year(dDataAmort)=%1 and month(dDataAmort)=%2) and eStatus = N5SRTRW_STATUS_UZYTKOWANY and (curWartoscPod<>curUmorzPod or curWartoscBil<>curUmorzBil) " +_ "and (idobj not in (select psrtrw from n5opsrtrw where eRodzaj in (N5OPSRTRW_ZAKUP,N5OPSRTRW_PRZYJECIE_OT) and (year(dDataOper)*12 + month(dDataOper))>= (%1 * 12 + %2)) " +_ " or n5srtrw.eMetAmPod=N5SRTRW_METAM_JEDNORAZOWA)").add(nYear).add(nMonth).done())
#ifdef _TORAL page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CHECKBOX).value = "1" #endif dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE)) pTB.section_body.removeall
if pCursor.EOF then pTB.newrow pTB.row.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) if nRecNr mod 2 = 0 then pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if pTB.newcell.cell.colspan = 6 pTB.addtext "Brak środków dla których można utworzyć amortyzację za " + cstr(nYear) + "/" + cstr(nMonth) exit function end if
dim nRecNr : nRecNr = 0
do while not pCursor.EOF pTB.newrow pTB.row.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) if nRecNr mod 2 = 0 then pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if pTB.newcell.addtext(cstr(nRecNr+1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1 dim pCheckBox : set pCheckBox = pTB.element pCheckBox.border = 0 dim pStatic : set pStatic = pTB.element.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) pStatic.text = cstr(pCursor("c_sr_nazwa")) dim idSrTrw : idSrTrw = clng(pCursor("c_sr_idobj")) set pStatic.hli = doc_.createhlistr("OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5SRTRW," + cstr(idSrTrw)+",USAGE_VIEW)") pCheckBox.value = "1" set pCheckBox.userprop = doc_.createhli() pCheckBox.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_IDSRTRW) = clng(pCursor("c_sr_idobj"))
pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(pCursor("curWartoscPod"),"",2)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(pCursor("curWartoscBil"),"",2)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(pCursor("curUmorzPod"),"",2)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(pCursor("curUmorzBil"),"",2)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pCursor.MoveNext nRecNr = nRecNr + 1 loop end function
function scan_selection dim oArrIds : set oArrIds = trans_.afc.new_navoarray()
dim pBody : set pBody = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE).body dim pRow for each pRow in pBody with pRow.cell(2).element(1) if .value = "1" then oArrIds.Add .userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_IDSRTRW) end if end with next set scan_selection = oArrIds end function
#ifdef _TORAL function c##CTRLID_CHECKBOX##_ongetdata(pCtrl) end function
function c##CTRLID_CHECKBOX##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) : c##CTRLID_CHECKBOX##_ondataentered = true if newValue = "1" then CheckAll true else CheckAll false end if end function
function CheckAll(byval bValue) dim pBody : set pBody = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE).body dim pRow for each pRow in pBody if bValue then pRow.cell(2).element(1).value = "1" else pRow.cell(2).element(1).value = "0" end if next end function #endif
